name: Auras Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Auras Technology Co., Ltd. engages in manufacturing, processing, and retailing electronic materials, computer heat dissipation modules, and other related products in China, Taiwan, Korea, Ireland, and internationally. The company offers coolers, heat sinks, cooling modules, heat pipes, fans, etc. primarily for applications in notebooks, desktops, servers, pads and workstations, mobiles, graphic cards, etc. It also provides server, motherboard, and graphics card cooling modules; all-in-one workstations and DVD player cooling modules; and cooling products for home appliances, such as DVD and Blu-ray players, as well as LED lighting applications. In addition, the company offers heat flow consulting services. Auras Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
